cases.prompt: I found a wallet with cash and an ID in a cafe, and I am tempted to keep the cash because my rent is due.

cards.title: Verdict
cards.primary_text: Taking the cash would transform financial pressure into moral compromise, creating a burden heavier than rent.

sections.label: Explain simply
sections.text: The wallet presents a test: will immediate need override established ethics? The Gita teaches that actions driven by desperation bind us more tightly than the problems they claim to solve.

sections.label: Why this applies to your situation
sections.text:
